PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUEVARA, ORLANDO CAMPOS, LUIS GUEVARA, LESTER GUEVARA, JUAN ALL MINORS GUEVARA, ORLANDO GUARDIAN AD LITEM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HENDRICKSON, ROBIN RIVERA, JOANNA CAMPOS MOREIRA, IRMA $11,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,000.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR - DEFENDANTS TO PAY $6000, $2500 AND $2500 TO PLAINTIFFS ORLANDO GUEVARA, LESTER GUEVARA AND JUAN GUEVARA RESPECTIVELY.
